## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] API changes are backward-compatible (or migration provided)
- [ ] Kafka topic changes are documented in README
- [ ] DB migration scripts added in `src/main/resources/db/migration/`

- [ ] Log messages are meaningful and at appropriate levels
